reviews.comment:
Buen servicio.Deberian solucionar el tema de los indigentes que hacen desastres en el baño.Muy sucios.En el ACÁ de Belgrano hay una chicharro y vigilancia

(Translated by Google)
Good service. They should solve the problem of homeless people making a mess in the bathroom. Very dirty. At the ACÁ in Belgrano, there is a chicharro and security.
